{{Quote|No smarter than your brother.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]|<ref name="Payback">{{Tales|18|Payback (comic story)}}</ref>}}
'''Feleen Bantillian''' was the son of [[Drex]], [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] of the [[Gallapraxis system/Legends|Gallapraxis system]], and the brother of [[Gavron Sil]].

==Biography==
After [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] killed his brother, Bantillian helped his father arrange a trap for Fett by posing as an enemy of Drex. Hiding in an abandoned [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory in the badlands of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Vornax]], Feleen equipped himself with a personal [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] scavenged from an old [[Droideka/Legends|droideka]] and ambushed Fett with a small army of partially scrapped [[Battle droid/Legends|war droids]].

Bantillian was quickly outsmarted and outmanoeuvred by Fett, who doused the surface of his deflector shield with oil and set it alight. In a panic, the terrified Bantillian threw himself into a pool of water, which put out the flames but resulted in his death by drowning. Furious at being duped, the bounty hunter cut off Bantillian's head, placing a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] in its mouth, and presenting it to Drex, whose court was destroyed in the resulting explosion.

==Appearances==
